detaileddescription.para: You can refer to the below stated example applications for more details on how to use axipmon driver.

sect1.title: xaxipmon_intr_example.c
sect1.para: Contains an example on how to use the XAxipmon driver directly. This example shows the usage of driver in interrupt mode.

sect1.title: xaxipmon_ocm_example.c
sect1.para: Contains an example on how to use the XAxipmon driver directly. This example shows the usage of driver to measure Write Transcation Count, Write Byte Count, Read Transcation Count, Read Byte Count.

sect1.title: xaxipmon_polled_example.c
sect1.para: Contains an example on how to use the XAxipmon driver directly. This example shows the usage of driver in polled mode.
